texto: Surprisingly, I came closer to really knowing myself, not because I feared death, because we were always aware of it, but rather because I was always challenging myself about what had led me there and about how strong my commitment really was.
explicacao: Citação de Aleida March sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Surprisingly, I came closer to really knowing myself, not because I feared death, because we were…” articula sucesso, revolution, revolutionary em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como luto e revolutionary.
